name: Lumexa Imaging Holdings, Inc.
summary: Business Expenses . The Company will pay or reimburse the Executive only for those business expenses incurred or paid by the Executive for travel and entertainment consistent with the Company’s directives, as communicated from time to time, and the expense policies in force for other employees of the Company at the time and in accordance with past practices.
